# Meridian Compliance & Advisory

> Evidence-led diesel refund, SARS dispute and customs/excise advisory for South African mining, industrial and fuel-intensive businesses.

Meridian Compliance & Advisory helps businesses solve difficult SARS, diesel refund, customs, excise, fuel management and operational control problems — especially where law, evidence, systems and practical implementation need to line up.

Email: info@meridianconsulting.co.za
Website: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/

## Services

- Diesel refund compliance: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/diesel-refund-compliance.html
- SARS dispute support: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/sars-dispute-support.html
- Customs and excise advisory: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/customs-excise-advisory.html
- Data analytics advisory: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/data-analytics-advisory.html
- Diesel refund legislation and cases: https://www.meridianconsulting.co.za/diesel-refund-resources.html
